short_summary: Iran deal stalls, gang leader killed
rationale: Iran deal signing claim contradicted by Tehran keeps geopolitical uncertainty alive for Americans; Tren de Aragua airstrike is a continuation of established pattern.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Conflicting signals on Iran deal create continued uncertainty for US oil markets and Middle East policy. No resolution means ongoing geopolitical risk for Americans.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike
top_events.summary: US airstrike eliminates Tren de Aragua leader; continuation of Trump administration's aggressive anti-gang posture, no major new policy shift.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Federal AI security policy continues to restrict Anthropic's tools; ongoing background story with limited immediate impact on most Americans' daily lives.
